nasb.text: “Now therefore thus says the Lord God of Israel concerning this city of which you say, ‘It is given into the hand of the king of Babylon by sword, by famine and by pestilence.’

esv.text: “Now therefore thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, concerning this city of which you say, ‘It is given into the hand of the king of Babylon by sword, by famine, and by pestilence’:

cnv.text: “論到這城，就是你們說：‘因為刀劍、饑荒和瘟疫的緣故，交在巴比倫王手中的’，現在耶和華以色列的　神卻這樣說：

ccb.text: 耶利米啊，你们说这座城要因战争、饥荒和瘟疫而落入巴比伦王手中，但以色列的上帝耶和华说，
